posts.author: bf4nlb8 (John Sierakowski)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good afternoon,

       I am attempting to add a formula column in monday.com.   I click on the ... / Settings / Customize Formula Column.    A new drop-down is display for about 1 second then disapears and I am unable to add the formula.    Is anyone having this issue?  If so,  do you have a resolution?

Thank you
John

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @bf4nlb8 !

Sounds like a bug to me. Does it still persist?

If so, I suggest contacting monday support here.

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
